text:
To Masadora! Part 3 (いざマサドラへ！③, Iza Masadora e! (San)) is the 137 th chapter of the Hunter × Hunter manga, written and illustrated by Yoshihiro Togashi.

Synopsis

Gon and Killua are shocked to learn that the young-looking girl is 57 years old. Killua calls her ancient, and she punches him far back, saying that she learned Nen 40 years ago and telling them to be grateful for the free teaching. Killua still has a problem since they don't even know who she is, and she introduces herself as Biscuit Krueger, a professional Hunter. Killua is still against being taught by her, and Gon adds that they have Wing as their teacher. Biscuit recognizes the name, describing him and saying he was once one of her students. She asks if the two of them are Hunters as well, but Gon replies that only he is, with Biscuit remembering when she was an examiner for the secret test.

Killua seems more content now, and Biscuit summons her book and pulls out the "Hyper Puffball" card for the creature that Gon and Killua couldn't catch earlier. She points out that the card's rank is only "D", adding that it's not even a specified slot card. She stresses that there are many other players who can get the card and are better at combat than them. As she asks them what would happen if these players wanted to hurt them, she suddenly senses something, and the player with scissors is shown still stalking them, eager to use his Scissor Hands.

Biscuit tells them to sit down close to her and to open their books so it looks like they're chatting. She says that an enemy is behind her and tells them to not try to sense him, since he would see them tensing up. Both had no clue that he was there, and Biscuit says that he let a little bloodlust slip out because they all look like kids, who are very rarely skilled with abilities in combat. She stresses how dangerous he is, and Killua asks her what they should do. Biscuit asks them what they think, now that they know the enemy is intelligent and can adjust. The two agree that they should all stick together, and while Biscuit says that that's the standard answer, she tells them that she will go off by herself, confident that he will come after her alone. She says that she will go south while they go north, telling them to walk for around 500 meters and then to shut off their aura and quickly head back.

Killua understands her plan, but Biscuit suddenly slaps him across the face and pretends to get into an argument with him. They go their separate ways, and Killua says that Biscuit is amazing, explaining that even though he was prepared for the faintest indication of danger, he didn't know what she had done until he felt his cheek hurting. After they all walk the 500 meters and quickly head back, they find that the player has cut Biscuit's hair with his scissors. The man proceeds to eat it, explaining that by doing so he can learn minute details about the person even they don't know. He is stunned to find out that not only is the young-looking girl 57 years old, but her body is like forged steel, realizing that she has trained for years to surpass her physical limits. He sets down his belt full of scissors and asks to spar with her. Taking off her gloves, Biscuit is glad to know that he isn't just a cannibal. The man attempts to strike her, but Biscuit easily dodges and grabs his arm, flinging him above herself and striking him hard in the back. As he spews out blood on the ground, Biscuit says that he should consider himself lucky since he would be dead if it were a battle involving Nen.
